description: You are a NOAA meteorologist at Wallops Island preparing a satellite downlink schedule. GPredict's POES_Tracking module needs to be brought to operational status. Correct the Wallops_CDA ground station to: latitude 37.9402°N, longitude 75.4576°W, altitude 15m, weather station code KWAL. Set it as the default ground station. The POES_Tracking module should track the operational NOAA polar-orbiting fleet: NOAA-15 (NORAD 25338), NOAA-18 (NORAD 28654), NOAA-19 (NORAD 33591), METOP-B (NORAD 38771), METOP-C (NORAD 43689), and SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849). Remove any non-POES satellites currently in the module and add any missing ones. Bind the module to Wallops_CDA. Configure the module with a Map and Table layout: topographical map background with the solar terminator line enabled, and a satellite table showing Azimuth, Elevation, Range, and Range Rate columns. Set global preferences to UTC time display and Metric units. Generate upcoming pass predictions for METOP-C from Wallops_CDA and save the results to ~/Documents/METOP_C_passes.txt. Leave GPredict maximized with the POES_Tracking module visible. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
